description.ko: 디지털 식물학의 획기적인 진전인 FLORA-9은 유기적 성장과 절차적 코드의 완벽한 결합을 나타내며, 빛을 발하는 데이터 정맥과 함께 가상 공간에서 개화하는 식물입니다.
description.en: A breakthrough in digital botany, FLORA-9 represents the perfect marriage between organic growth and procedural code, blooming in virtual spaces with light-emitting data veins.

prompt: Macro photography of a futuristic mechanical flower named FLORA-9, translucent crystalline petals with glowing blue fiber-optic veins, floating in a dark digital void, circuit board patterns on the leaves, soft bokeh of floating data particles, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, neon aesthetics, hyper-detailed textures.
